entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in the Sahelian agro-ecozone

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: An agro-ecozone characterized by inadequate moisture and poor soils

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the millet crop measured in kg ha-1

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A soil nutrient deficiency that limits crop productivity

entities.name: INADEQUATE MOISTURE
entities.description: Lack of sufficient water for crop growth in the Sahel

entities.name: POOR SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low fertility and nutrient deficiency

entities.name: PHOSPHATE ROCK
entities.description: A local source of phosphorus used as fertilizer

entities.name: INORGANIC PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Chemical phosphorus fertilizers such as superphosphates

entities.name: UNCERTAIN RAINFALL REGIMES
entities.description: Variable precipitation patterns affecting crop growth

entities.name: STANDARDIZED PRECIPITATION INDEX
entities.description: An index used to analyze rainfall patterns and group experimental periods

entities.name: PERCENT CONFIDENCE LIMITS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze mean rainfall

entities.name: SINGLE SUPERPHOSPHATE
entities.description: A specific type of inorganic phosphorus fertilizer

entities.name: TRIPLE SUPERPHOSPHATE
entities.description: A specific type of inorganic phosphorus fertilizer

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS APPLICATION RATES
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus fertilizer applied per unit area

entities.name: TRADITIONAL CULTIVATION
entities.description: The conventional method of growing millet used by farmers

entities.name: STABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to evaluate the consistency of crop yields across different fields

entities.name: PRESEASON MOISTURE
entities.description: Rainfall occurring in May-June before the main growing season

entities.name: NON-ACIDULATED PHOSPHATE ROCK
entities.description: Phosphate rock that has not undergone acidulation

entities.name: RISK ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to evaluate the financial returns of fertilizer application

entities.name: ACIDULATED PHOSPHATE ROCK
entities.description: Phosphate rock treated with acid to increase phosphorus availability

entities.name: RISK OF RETURNS
entities.description: The financial risk associated with the returns on millet production
